---
name: Boundary / entity correction
about: Report a wrong boundary, wrong name, wrong dates, or wrong source for a specific entity.
title: "[DATA] "
labels: ["data", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Thanks for the correction. The more specific and sourced, the faster
  we can act. See CONTRIBUTING.md §1 for the full policy.
-->

## Entity

- **ID** (if known): 
- **name_original**: 
- **API link**: https://atlaspi.cra-srl.com/v1/entities/`{id}`

## What is wrong

<!--
  One specific claim. "The eastern boundary in 1450 CE should reach
  the Volga, not the Don" — not "the boundary looks wrong."
-->

## Correct value or polygon

<!--
  If a name/date/source: state the correct value.
  If a boundary: point to a better source — a Natural Earth field,
  a Ourednik `historical-basemaps` feature NAME and snapshot year,
  an academic atlas plate, or a hand-drawn GeoJSON attached below.
-->

## Primary source

<!--
  At least one primary or recognised academic source. A full citation
  is ideal; a DOI, ISBN, or URL is acceptable. See CONTRIBUTING.md for
  what counts.
-->

## Is this a disputed territory?

- [ ] No — this is a straightforward factual correction.
- [ ] Yes — the entity's `status` is (or should be) `disputed`. I have
      read `docs/ethics/ETHICS-003-disputed-territories.en.md` and
      understand the 0.70 confidence cap is intentional.

## How would you like to be attributed?

<!--
  Contributors who provide substantive corrections are listed in
  ACKNOWLEDGMENTS.md with their consent. Choose one:
-->

- [ ] Name and affiliation
- [ ] Name only
- [ ] Anonymous (e.g. "a medievalist specialising in Iberia")
- [ ] Do not acknowledge
